trajectory.semantic: short horizon local-space path samples used by AI4Animation-style motion matching and control
trajectory.position: XZ tuple in local avatar space
trajectory.direction: XZ unit-ish facing vector in local avatar space

energy.semantic: motion amplitude and wing/tail activity control

gesture.semantic: arm, hand, and expressive pose control

step.semantic: leg and foot gait phase control
